title: Airport Knowledge Base Schema
description: Schema for the airport passenger assistance knowledge base. Defines the structure of each airport record used by the chatbot's retrieval components. The knowledge base is a structured lookup resource, not a trained model.

knowledge_base_description.description: Top-level note describing the data source and its synthetic nature. Renamed from 'description' to avoid confusion with the per-record 'description' field.

records.description: List of airport location/service records. At least 15 required by the brief; 20 provided.

id.description: Unique identifier (slug). Used as the retrieval target and to link related_facilities. Justification: stable key independent of display name.

name.description: Human-readable location or service name. Justification: shown to the passenger in the response.

category.description: Service category. Justification: enables intent-to-category matching and image-category matching; drives class-distribution analysis.

terminal.description: Terminal the record belongs to (Terminal 1 or Terminal 2). Justification: supports queries like 'lounge near terminal 2'.

floor_or_zone.description: Floor and zone within the terminal. Justification: needed for precise direction generation.

description.description: Short description of the location/service. Justification: provides the textual content used for semantic retrieval and the response body.

opening_hours.description: Opening hours or availability. Justification: required field for the response; supports 'opening hours' intent.

directions.description: Step-by-step direction text. Justification: the core navigational answer the chatbot returns.

accessibility.description: Accessibility information. Justification: directly supports the brief's accessibility and ethics requirements.

related_facilities.description: List of related record ids. Justification: enables 'related facilities' recommendations and graph-like navigation.

keywords.description: Short list of search keywords/synonyms for the record. Justification: supports a lightweight keyword-matching signal alongside semantic retrieval, and aids vocabulary/intent analysis. Curated to stay in sync with the record content.

contact.description: Emergency or assistance contact where appropriate, otherwise null. Justification: human handover and critical-info redirection.

visual_description.description: Textual description of how this place/sign looks. Justification: bridges the image (CLIP) pipeline to the knowledge base by embedding visual cues into the shared semantic space. Note: this field alone is embedded by CLIP; the text pipeline uses a separate combined text derived at runtime from name + description + directions + location.
